title: Goblin Mode Dungeon Catalog: Second Wave

families.title: Mushroom Sluice
families.focus: crawl-space scouting, valve timing, wet-noise masking, and split-lane extraction
families.coordination: two-front infiltration with a timed valve route and a noisy fallback route
families.goblin_aesthetic: glowing mushrooms, waxed grates, wet rope, stolen crumbs, and ankle-deep dwarven runoff

families.title: Beardglass Lampworks
families.focus: light-cone avoidance, rune-lamp sabotage, mirror-route handoffs, and synchronized scouting
families.coordination: visibility puzzle with optional alarms that reward simultaneous lamp sabotage and distraction
families.goblin_aesthetic: brass lanterns, soot-black mirrors, stolen wick wax, purple boggart shadows, and dwarf beardglass prisms

families.title: Coalwhisper Kitchens
families.focus: food distractions, greasy route control, pantry looting, and quiet passage through crowded service rooms
families.coordination: route-deception heist where the boggart and ogre can buy time for a scout-led objective grab
families.goblin_aesthetic: stolen cheese, soot pots, mushroom gravy, clattering copper, and goblin snack-tax nonsense

families.title: Tinwhistle Lockhouse
families.focus: door timing, key routing, fake prisoner noises, and divided jail corridors
families.coordination: split party lock puzzle with scout information, kobold mechanisms, boggart decoys, and ogre body-blocking
families.goblin_aesthetic: ringing keyhooks, low cell doors, stolen lock oil, goblin chalk marks, and whispering jail vents

families.title: Underbell Belfry
families.focus: alarm suppression, rope cutting, vertical chokepoints, and synchronized bell silencing
families.coordination: alarm gauntlet where each role controls one failure mode: scouting, silence, blocking, or misdirection
families.goblin_aesthetic: huge under-mountain bells, frayed ropes, mushroom wax, goblin knots, and purple false echoes

families.title: Slagpump Works
families.focus: machine noise, rotating valves, steam cover, and delayed defender response
families.coordination: industrial timing puzzle where the kobold changes state, scout scouts, boggart redirects, and ogre blocks steam lanes
families.goblin_aesthetic: slag pipes, hot rivets, wet stone, goblin soot handprints, and stolen pump grease

families.title: Rustsprocket Armory
families.focus: weapon-rack hazards, shield-wall bypassing, noisy forge suppression, and tactical loot denial
families.coordination: combat-adjacent heist where the ogre opens lanes while stealth roles prevent the alarm from compounding
families.goblin_aesthetic: stolen bolts, goblin dents in polished shields, oily forge smoke, and racks of dwarf-sized inconvenience

families.title: Rookery Cipher Nest
families.focus: messenger interception, bird-spook discipline, route concealment, and courier timing
families.coordination: information heist where scout sightlines, boggart decoys, and kobold mechanisms prevent alarm cascades
families.goblin_aesthetic: angry mountain crows, wax seals, stolen quills, goblin feather cloaks, and purple whisper charms

families.title: Nine-Nails Treasury
families.focus: vault locks, pressure plates, decoy loot, exact extraction timing, and multi-role trap discipline
families.coordination: capstone stealth-heist with simultaneous switches, decoys, optional loot, and a dangerous extraction route
families.goblin_aesthetic: brass nail crowns, tiny goblin lock picks, cursed purple coin smoke, mushroom wax seals, and too many shiny things

design_principles: Use dwarven defenders as organized pressure, not lethal targets.
Make the best lines require multi-agent information sharing and timing.
Prefer sneak, sabotage, distraction, trap reversal, and route blocking over direct fighting.
Let optional loot tempt agents into noisy or greedy failures.
